title: Install docker on Ubuntu Server
snippet: Installation  Update apt packagesudo apt updatesudo apt install -y ca-certificates curl  Add Docker’s official GPG key:sudo install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyringssudo curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.ascsudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc  ...
